<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Claude"> <diagram id="arch-v7" name="System Architecture v7 (portrait)"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-324" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="1170" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=12;fontFamily=Times New Roman;align=center;spacingLeft=24;" value="<b style='font-size:14px'>User</b>
